evaluators.name: Deep-Sea Mollusk Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any collection contains at least 3 marine species with min_depth_m ≥ 1000 m and min_length_cm ≥ 10 cm.

evaluators.name: Highest-Risk Tridacna Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether there is a comparison set containing exactly one species, and that species is the most threatened member of genus Tridacna.

evaluators.name: Invasive North America Freshwater Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any collection contains at least 2 freshwater species that are invasive in North America with first_record_year ≥ 1950.

evaluators.name: Largest Indo-Pacific Cephalopod List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether there is a collection containing exactly one species, and that species is the largest Indo-Pacific cephalopod with max_length_cm ≥ 50.

evaluators.name: Cephalopod Camouflage Teaching Favorite Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether at least one favorited teaching resource is about cephalopod camouflage, targets ages 12–14, and was published between 2019 and 2024.

evaluators.name: Japan vs Australia Distribution Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any comparison set includes at least one species present in both Japan and Australia and at least one species present in Japan but not Australia.

evaluators.name: Earliest Western Atlantic Muricidae Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the earliest-described Muricidae species present in the Western Atlantic is bookmarked, with partial credit for bookmarking any Western Atlantic Muricidae.

evaluators.name: Toxoglossan Gastropod Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any collection contains at least 3 gastropod species with radula_type set to 'toxoglossan'.
